utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 main items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item contains full details as expected: 
1. property – includes type, price, currency, bedrooms, location, accessibility, and maintenance level (fully specified). 
2. financing – includes solution and terms (fully specified). 
3. legal_services – includes list of services, cost, and currency (fully specified). 
4. moving_services – includes service level, cost, currency, and timeline flexibility (fully specified). 
5. setup_services – includes utility_package_type, cost, currency, and list of services included (fully specified). 
6. total_budget – includes cost breakdowns and grand total with currency (fully specified). 
Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered and complete.
